name: Karla Castro
ai_summary: Karla Castro is a teacher assistant from Tucson, AZ with experience working with children with autism, seeking full-time or part-time opportunities. She emphasizes patience, understanding, and personalized communication in her teaching approach, and is willing to travel for the right position.
